description: Learn how to pair flavors effectively to enhance your dishes.

steps.instruction: Understand the basics of flavor profiles and how they interact.
Experiment with different herbs and spices to find complementary flavors.
Learn about umami and how to incorporate it into your cooking.
Practice creating your own unique flavor combinations.

safety_notes: Always taste your dishes as you cook to adjust flavors accordingly.
Be aware of potential allergens in ingredients.
